src/main/java/tr/org/lider/Lider2Applica.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation imports with jakarta.annotation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/A.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Update the base request mapping path to include the /api prefix, aligning with modern API versioning or routing conventions.
Replace deprecated @RequestMapping with specific Spring MVC annotations.
Update the base request mapping to follow RESTful naming conventions and add API versioning prefix.
Remove the legacy endpoint that returned raw HTML strings, which is incompatible with modern API design.
Change the list agents endpoint from POST with request params to POST with a DTO body for better scalability.
Change the detail endpoint from POST with request param to GET with path variable for REST compliance.
Replace javax.validation imports with jakarta.validation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Remove dependency on javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest as it is no longer available in the default Spring Boot 3 stack without explicit servlet API dependencies.

src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/C.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring MVC annotations (RequestMethod, @RequestParam) with modern Spring Boot 3 / Spring Framework 6 equivalents (@GetMapping, @PathVariable).
Change the base request mapping path to include an 'api' prefix, standardizing the REST API structure.
Rename endpoint paths from camelCase to kebab-case to follow RESTful naming conventions.
Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Update Spring Security import to use the new package structure compatible with Spring Security 6.
Update the base request mapping path to include the /api prefix.
Change the delete endpoint to use a path variable for ID instead of a request body.
src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/C.human_impl: Changed @RequestBody ConkyTemplate to @PathVariable Long id and updated URL to /delete/id/{id}.

src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/C.general_idea: Introduce a new paginated list endpoint replacing the simple list endpoint.

src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/D.general_idea: Update the base request mapping to align with new API versioning or structure conventions.

src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/E.general_idea: Update base request mapping path to include 'api' prefix and use kebab-case.
Remove the getInnerHtmlPage endpoint which is no longer needed.

src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/F.general_idea: Refactor the controller from a Spring MVC view-based controller to a REST API controller returning JSON responses.
src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/F.human_impl: Changed annotation from @Controller to @RestController and replaced Model/RedirectAttributes returns with ResponseEntity<?>.

src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/F.general_idea: Update the base request mapping path to follow RESTful API conventions.
Refactor the forgot password endpoint to accept JSON body and return JSON responses.
src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/F.human_impl: Changed method signature to accept @RequestBody Map<String,String> and return ResponseEntity<?> with specific HTTP status codes.

src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/F.general_idea: Update the call to the email service to use a more specific method name for password resets.
Refactor the password reset validation endpoint to return JSON status instead of rendering a view.
src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/F.human_impl: Changed GET /reset/{uuid} to return ResponseEntity<?> containing the UUID or error messages.

src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/F.general_idea: Refactor the password reset save endpoint to accept JSON body and return JSON responses.
src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/F.human_impl: Changed POST /reset/{uuid} to accept @RequestBody Map<String,String> and return ResponseEntity<?>.

src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/F.general_idea: Use the injected custom password encoder to hash the new password with Argon2.
src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/F.human_impl: Changed ldapService.updateConsoleUserPassword to ldapService.updateEntry with "{ARGON2}" + customPasswordEncoder.encode(password).
